# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Prevent istio authz bypass.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: service-access-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: target-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/svc-account-1
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/svc-account-2
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/resource/*
        - /api/v1/data/*
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /health
        - /ready
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /metrics
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        paths:
        - /api/v1/public/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        paths:
